user.title: User
user.description: Information about a registered bakery user

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created

capture.title: Capture
capture.description: Secret log camera capture of baked items

photo.description: Base64 data URL of the image

timestamp.description: Epoch timestamp of when the bake was captured

itemType.description: The type of baked item captured

isOfficial.description: Whether this was an official/certified baking session

userId.description: Firebase Auth UID of the user who captured the image

users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles linked by Firebase Auth UID

captures/{captureId}.description: Collection of public or user-specific bakery captures
